match.userMessage:
A cinematic establishing shot for "Untitled Sequence". Opening scene: Scarlett's fingers lift the lid of the white box on the sunlit vanity and draw out the coral lipstick tube.  
She rotates the base with her thumb, extending the glossy coral bullet in a slow twist.  
Her index finger traces the smooth surface of the bullet before bringing it toward her mouth.  
The lipstick glides across her lower lip in one continuous stroke, leaving a vivid coral layer.  
She presses her lips together, then parts them into a soft smile that catches the window light.  
Scarlett Art style: Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save. Mood: Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool. Lighting: Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Warm late-afternoon glow for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast. No text, no titles, no subtitles, no watermarks, no letters, no words, no signs, no UI elements.
